title: cryptocarya litoralis
intro: Cryptocarya litoralis, also known as the coastal cryptocarya or coastal laurel, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Cryptocarya litoralis are said to include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
